description_long: This is an adult male figure equipped with tactical gear, including a ballistic vest, helmet with mounted optics, and various pouches and devices attached to the vest and belt. He wears a short-sleeved t-shirt, jeans, and sturdy shoes, with his arms slightly outstretched. The helmet features integrated communication equipment and night vision goggles, while the vest is loaded with utility pouches, a radio, and what appears to be a first aid kit. Cables and straps are visible, suggesting advanced electronic or communication capabilities. The figure's face is partially obscured by the helmet and a face covering, giving a prepared and alert appearance suitable for urban tactical operations. The overall impression is of a well-equipped, modern urban operator ready for high-risk environments.
description: A tactical adult male outfitted with a helmet, ballistic vest, and utility gear, wearing casual clothing and sturdy shoes. The figure is prepared for urban operations with advanced equipment and protective accessories.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tactical vest, helmet with mounted optics, face covering, and utility pouches clearly, with arms outstretched.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the helmet profile, side-mounted gear, and the thickness of the vest and pouches.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the helmet, vest, additional pouches, and cables, as well as the back pockets of the jeans.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the right arm, side gear, and the attachment points for equipment on the vest and belt.
attribute_clothing_type: tactical short-sleeve shirt, jeans, ballistic vest, tactical helmet with mounted optics and accessories
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
